𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗫𝗘𝗟𝗔𝗥 | Intercepting, inspecting, and modifying HTTP/HTTPS traffic for debugging, reverse engineering, testing, and automation.  🔥 Super Hot!

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Intercepting, inspecting, and modifying HTTP/HTTPS traffic for debugging, reverse engineering, testing, and automation.
📅 Created: Jan 2023 • Updated: Apr 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Lua scripting for request/response modification, blocking, or mocking
✅ Automatic CA generation for HTTPS interception
✅ Forward and reverse proxy modes
✅ Multiple interfaces: Terminal, TUI (ratatui), and Web GUI (axum + WebSocket)
✅ Request filtering and detailed inspection
✅ Easy CA installation via a dedicated local domain


•••••••••••••••••••••••

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 691 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 39 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 5 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

•••••••••••••••••••••••

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Proxelar is a Man-in-the-Middle proxy written in Rust, designed to intercept, inspect, and modify HTTP/HTTPS traffic. It offers flexible interfaces including a TUI and a web GUI, and supports Lua scripting for runtime traffic manipulation.

•••••••••••••••••••••••

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/emanuele-em/proxelar

•••••••••••••••••••••••

•••••••••••••••••••••••

#cli #http_proxy #https_proxy #man_in_the_middle #mitm

𝗨𝗡𝗖𝗢𝗩𝗘𝗥 | Discovering exposed hosts on the internet by querying multiple search engines through a unified CLI interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Discovering exposed hosts on the internet by querying multiple search engines through a unified CLI interface.
📅 Created: Mar 2022 • Updated: Apr 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Query multiple search engines simultaneously
✅ Supports Shodan, Censys, FOFA, Hunter, Quake, ZoomEye, Netlas, CriminalIP, PublicWWW, HunterHow, Google, Onyphe, and Driftnet
✅ Multiple API key input and automatic randomization
✅ stdin/stdout support for input and output
✅ Built with automation in mind for pipeline integration


✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 264 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 4 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Uncover is a Go-based command-line tool that leverages multiple search engine APIs to discover publicly exposed hosts on the internet. It's designed for automation and integration into existing security and reconnaissance workflows.

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗖𝗧𝗢𝗦 | To develop a free, open-source operating system that can run Windows applications and drivers.  🌟 Rising Fast!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 C 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To develop a free, open-source operating system that can run Windows applications and drivers.
📅 Created: Oct 2017 • Updated: Apr 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Windows NT family compatibility (applications and drivers)
✅ Open Source development
✅ Alpha quality, under heavy development
✅ Build environment (RosBE) for Windows and Unix/GNU-Linux
✅ Support for building bootable CD images
✅ Installation on FAT16/FAT32 partitions


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 17.4K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 2.1K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ReactOS is an open-source operating system aiming for compatibility with applications and drivers designed for Microsoft Windows NT family. It is currently in alpha development, meaning it is unstable and best tested in virtual environments.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/reactos/reactos

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗠𝗨𝗝𝗢𝗖𝗢 | Accurate and fast simulation of articulated structures interacting with their environment, primarily for research and development in robotics, biomechanics, and machine learning.  🌟 Rising Fast!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🔨 C++ 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Accurate and fast simulation of articulated structures interacting with their environment, primarily for research and development in robotics, biomechanics, and machine learning.
📅 Created: Aug 2021 • Updated: Apr 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ C API for low-level control and performance
✅ Interactive visualization with native GUI (OpenGL)
✅ XML compiler for preallocating data structures
✅ Python bindings for ease of use
✅ Unity game engine plug-in
✅ MJX (MuJoCo XLA) for JAX integration


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 12.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.4K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 156 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

MuJoCo is a high-performance physics engine designed for simulating articulated structures with contact. It is optimized for speed and accuracy, making it suitable for research in robotics, biomechanics, graphics, and machine learning.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/google-deepmind/mujoco
